title: Reading Food Labels
instruction: Look at the food label information and answer.
context: A tin of beans weighs 400g. The label says: Protein 5g, Fat 0.5g, Carbohydrates 12g per 100g serving.

questions.question: How much does the whole tin weigh?
How many 100g servings are in the tin?
How much protein is in one serving?
Which has the most per serving?
